scripts.dev:gateway: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@daemon/api-gateway^... && DAEMON_INGEST_SKIP_UPSTREAM=1 DAEMON_POLICY_SKIP_UPSTREAM=1 pnpm --filter @daemon/api-gateway dev
scripts.dev:up: pnpm run build --filter @daemon/cli && pnpm exec daemon-cli dev up
scripts.test:repo: pnpm run build && pnpm exec turbo run build --force --filter=@daemon/data-platform --filter=@daemon/ontology && node --test --import tsx tests/policy/policy-fixture.test.ts tests/ontology/registry.test.ts tests/ontology/pack-compliance.test.ts ontology/store/durable-ontology-store.test.ts tests/tenancy/isolation.test.ts tests/architecture/daemon-runtime.test.ts tests/contract/api-contract.test.ts tests/e2e/ingest-read-write.test.ts tests/e2e/ingest-read-write-http.test.ts tests/integration/stores.integration.test.ts tests/integration/audit-postgres.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ontology-durability.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ontology-propagation.integration.test.ts tests/integration/ontology-rls.integration.test.ts tests/integration/gateway-http.test.ts external-systems/adapters/system-adapter.test.ts toolchain/plugins/plugin-host.test.ts
scripts.release:check: pnpm run build && cd packages/platform-types && npm pack --dry-run && cd ../sdk && npm pack --dry-run && cd ../cli && npm pack --dry-run
